service.maintenanceNoChangesRecorded: There are no recorded changes for this appointment yet.
service.appointmentDescription: Take advantage of our workshop agreements for maintenance at the best price with no surprises.
service.appointmentPageDescription: Take advantage of our partner workshop agreements to get lower prices than a regular customer. Book your next service in seconds through CarsWise.
service.appointmentNoIdCarMessage: You have no IDCar available. Upload an IDCar first to be able to request an appointment.

service.appointmentLoadingWorkshops: Searching for nearby workshops by postal code...
service.appointmentSelectProviderHint: Select a provider to enable appointment confirmation.
service.appointmentPricingNotice: Indicative prices based on historical ranges (min/mid/high). The final amount may vary by model, parts, labour, city and workshop availability.
service.appointmentFeature5: No surprises in the final price
service.appointmentCalTitle: Choose a day and time for your appointment
service.appointmentCalSelectDay: Select a day to see available times
service.appointmentCalDayFullMessage: Full day, not available. Select another day.
service.appointmentCalConfirmHint: Select a day and then a time to confirm your appointment.
service.appointmentCalSlotUnavailable: The time slot is no longer available.
service.appointmentCalReservationError: Unable to book the selected time slot.
service.monthlyPlanTitle: Your maintenance in a fixed fee
service.monthlyPlanDescription: Pay a monthly fee and forget about unexpected mechanical costs. We manage it.
service.insuranceDescription: Upload your policy and our AI explains what it covers, what it doesn't, and what you could improve.

questionnaire.advancedModeOn: Activated: we add questions about zone, LEZ, garage, comfortable budget, capital and risk to refine the recommendation.

loading.title: Looking for the best options tailored to your profile

about.title: Who we are at
about.description: CarsWise was created so that anyone can buy, manage and sell their car with neutral information and real financial criteria.
about.missionText: We want to professionalize private mobility with the same analytical and operational discipline that today only large fleets and operators have.
about.feature1Text: Opportunity ranking focused on total cost to make better decisions before buying.
about.feature2Text: Assistant for maintenance, costs and continuity decisions throughout the vehicle lifecycle.
about.feature3Text: Market-based resale strategy to capture the highest possible residual value.
about.founder1Bio: Executive career in leasing, insurance and banking. Responsible for commercial growth, partnerships and operational execution.
about.founder2Bio: Experience in used car market, fleet management and structured operations. Leads pricing, unit economics and financial control of the platform.
about.founder3Bio: Specialist in software, data and digital product architecture. Leads the technical roadmap and CarsWise experience quality.
about.value1Text: Decisions based on data and objective criteria for the client, with no hidden agenda.
about.value2Text: Every recommendation combines financial analysis, usage context and real risk.
about.value3Text: We turn the diagnosis into action from purchase to sale of the vehicle.

landing.heroTitle: We help you make the best decision when buying, selling, or managing your car, saving you money and giving you peace of mind.
landing.phase1Desc: We define your context: budget, real usage, operation type and personal goals.
landing.phase1H1: Guided questionnaire in a few minutes
landing.phase1H2: Reading key signals for purchase or leasing
landing.phase1MetricLabel: Average time to get a useful profile
landing.phase2Desc: We combine AI + business rules to keep realistic and profitable options.
landing.phase2H1: Discards configurations with poor financial fit
landing.phase2H2: Prioritizes balance between cost, reliability and usage
landing.phase2H3: Clear comparative view to decide with confidence
landing.phase3Desc: From selling your car better to negotiating insurance and maintenance with a collective approach.
landing.phase3H1: Sales flows with report or certificate
landing.phase3MetricLabel: Full coverage of the mobility cycle
landing.draftTitle: You have a questionnaire in progress
landing.howItWorksTitle: What we offer and what you can achieve
landing.howItWorksDesc: It's not just a comparator: it's a decision and execution platform to optimize your entire mobility cycle.
landing.pricingDesc: Choose the level of support you need.

homeProcessSections.processDesc: Choose your starting point and we'll guide you step by step. Whether you already know what you're looking for or need guidance to find it.
homeProcessSections.buyDesc: Tell us how much you already know about what you want and we'll start from there. We analyze the market in real time to find the best options.
homeProcessSections.optionATitle: I know which model interests me
homeProcessSections.optionADesc: If you know which model you want, tell us the area, price range and mileage. We analyze current offers under those parameters.
homeProcessSections.optionBTitle: Help me find models that suit me best
homeProcessSections.optionBDesc: Take our test to get to know us and help you choose the car that fits your lifestyle and commute.
homeProcessSections.flowAStep2: Set your geographic and price limits
homeProcessSections.flowAStep3: We analyze ads in real time

homeProcessSections.serviceTitle: I want to hire a service
homeProcessSections.serviceDesc: Tools so your relationship with your car is easier, economical and hassle-free.
homeProcessSections.sellDesc: Tired of dealerships offering far less than your car is worth? We help you get a better deal.
homeProcessSections.sellOptionATitle: I give you the information to sell
homeProcessSections.sellOptionADesc: We don't appraise your vehicle, we give you market information: current average price and number of units for sale on major platforms.
homeProcessSections.sellOptionBTitle: Help me sell as a professional
homeProcessSections.sellOptionBDesc: We handle the price, advertising, customer contact and filtering potential customers, and manage the sale end-to-end.
homeProcessSections.sellFlowAHeader: Flow A - Self-managed sale - market information
homeProcessSections.sellFlowBHeader: Flow B - Managed comprehensive sale - 7 steps
homeProcessSections.sellFlowBStep1Sub: We certify the real condition of the vehicle
homeProcessSections.sellFlowBStep2: We agree the sale price with you
homeProcessSections.sellFlowBStep3: We evaluate fixing it if it improves positioning
homeProcessSections.sellFlowBStep6: We manage the transaction and handover
homeProcessSections.serviceAutogestorDesc: All your car information from a single platform: documentation, policy, maintenance receipts and warranties. Never lose a document again.
homeProcessSections.serviceMaintenanceDesc: We cross your vehicle data with the maintenance plan defined by the manufacturer and notify you when it's time. Schedule an appointment with our providers.
homeProcessSections.serviceAppointmentDesc: Take advantage of our agreements to get reduced prices and schedule your next service through us.
homeProcessSections.serviceMonthlyTitle: Your maintenance in a fixed monthly fee
homeProcessSections.serviceMonthlyDesc: Want to pay a monthly fee for preventive maintenance of your car and not get surprises before vacation? With us it's possible.
homeProcessSections.serviceInsuranceDesc: Upload your policy and our AI reads the conditions. We summarize advantages, weaknesses and help you find more complete or cheaper options at renewal.
homeProcessSections.sellFlowANote: You will receive the average listing price currently published on the main portals and the number of units found for sale with those characteristics.

buyOptions.optionADesc: If you know which model you want, tell us the area, price range and mileage. We analyze current offers under those parameters.

sell.pageSubtitle: Whether you want to manage the sale yourself with market information or prefer us to handle everything from start to finish.
sell.optionATitle: We give you the information to sell
sell.optionADesc: We don't appraise your vehicle, we give you market information: current average price and number of similar cars listed on the main portals.
sell.optionBTitle: We help you sell like a professional
sell.optionBDesc: We set the price, publish on portals, filter calls, schedule appointments and manage the full sale for you.
sell.pageDescriptionCertificate: We gather key vehicle information to issue an official certification and help you sell with stronger backing for the buyer.
sell.pageDescriptionReport: We provide real-time information on average price, historical trend, similar stock, and a launch range so you can publish with clear criteria.
sell.reportHeroDesc: We don't appraise your vehicle: we give you real market information. Enter your car details and get an objective reference to sell on your own with better judgement.
sell.step1Desc: License plate, brand, model, version, year and mileage.
sell.selectIdCarHint: Select one of your saved IDCars to analyze that vehicle.
sell.step2Title: We analyze the market in real time
sell.step2Desc: Current average price and number of similar listings published on main portals.
sell.step3Desc: Includes average price, current stock and positioning to publish with better judgement.
sell.ctaTitle: Want to buy instead of sell?
sell.ctaSubtitle: Explore whether to continue selling or switch to a purchase that fits better.
sell.professionalHeroTitle: We help you sell like a professional
sell.professionalHeroDesc: We set the price, publish on portals, filter calls, schedule appointments and manage the full sale for you. You only need to be available when the buyer arrives.
sell.professionalStep1Title: We inspect the real condition of the car
sell.professionalStep1Desc: Pre-certification to create trust from the first contact.
sell.professionalStep1Feat1: In-person inspection if the car's condition requires it
sell.professionalStep1Feat2: Condition report that accompanies the listing and builds buyer trust
sell.professionalStep1Feat3: We assess whether a small preparation improves the sale price
sell.professionalStep2Title: We define the price with you
sell.professionalStep2Desc: With support from market data and positioning against other listings.
sell.professionalStep2Feat1: We analyze the current market: average price, units for sale and days listed
sell.professionalStep2Feat2: We present a competitive price range and agree on the launch price together
sell.professionalStep2Feat3: We adjust the strategy based on whether you prioritize speed or maximum price
sell.professionalStep3Title: We publish and manage interested buyers
sell.professionalStep3Desc: Filter calls, coordination and commercial follow-up.
sell.professionalStep3Feat1: We write and publish optimized listings on the main portals
sell.professionalStep3Feat2: We receive and filter all calls and messages — only real buyers are forwarded to you
sell.professionalStep3Feat3: We coordinate visits according to your availability: buyers come to your home on your schedule
sell.professionalStep4Desc: Documentation, negotiation and final sale support.
sell.professionalStep4Feat1: Sales contract drafted and reviewed by us
sell.professionalStep4Feat2: Notification to the DGT and transfer of ownership management
sell.professionalStep4Feat3: Negotiation support so you don't sell below your target
sell.professionalStep4Feat4: Support until the money is in your account and the sale is closed
sell.professionalCtaSubtitle: Tell us what car you have and when you want to sell it. We'll contact you within 24 hours with a personalized plan.
sell.professionalCtaButton: I want to sell my car
sell.aiHint: AI will return the valuation and one real comparable listing for review.
sell.comparableHint: We show one real market comparable listing so you can contrast your price.
sell.comparableDescriptionFallback: Real comparable found to help you defend your listing price.

decision.completeFilters: Complete operation, brand, model, price, age and mileage ranges.

decision.listingFallback: Real listing found for your current setup.
decision.selectBrandModelCta: Select brand and model to see offers.
decision.selectBrandModelResults: Select brand and model to see results

resultsOffersView.nextStepDesc: Adjust this quick section and the offers block will reorder to show the best real match first.
resultsOffersView.buyChecklistItem1: Define your comfortable max monthly payment and real upfront capital.
resultsOffersView.buyChecklistItem2: Request a detailed quote with APR/NIR, insurance and total cost.
resultsOffersView.buyChecklistItem3: Discard any option that does not fit your target TCO.
resultsOffersView.altChecklistItem1: Check real coverage in your area and day-to-day availability.
resultsOffersView.altChecklistItem2: Compare occasional cost against fixed cost of another modality.
resultsOffersView.altChecklistItem3: Choose the option that creates the least friction for you now.
resultsOffersView.featuredIntro: The featured offer is the best fit for your case; below you will see 3 more that can also fit, with ranking reasons.
resultsOffersView.refineWarning: You can already open visible options while we refine an even better match.
resultsOffersView.loadingRealtime: We are recalculating offers for your profile in real time.
resultsOffersView.firstLoadInfo: Offers are shown immediately; if you tweak quick validation or monthly payment, they reorder automatically.
resultsOffersView.openOfferNewTab: Open offer in a new tab
resultsOffersView.featuredFallback: It is the best ranked real match for your test and current context.
resultsOffersView.referenceOnly: This card is a reference only: it takes you to the provider portal, not to an exact verified listing.

contact.heroSubtitle: Whether you want to buy, manage or sell your car, we are here to guide you with real criteria.
contact.formSubtitle: Response in less than 24 hours on business days.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us your situation, the type of car you are looking for, or any question...
contact.aiAssistantSubtitle: Ask me about buying, managing or selling your car.
contact.sentSubtitle: Thanks for contacting CarsWise. We will reply in less than 24 hours.
contact.promiseResponseText: No generic forms. A real person will answer you.
contact.promiseDirectText: We give direct criteria, not empty marketing.
contact.promiseDataText: GDPR compliant. We do not sell or share your information.
contact.botWelcome: Hi, I am the CarsWise assistant. I help you make better decisions about buying, managing or selling your car. How can I help?
chatSuggestions: When should I change my car?
How can I sell my car better?

faqItems.a: The first consultation is free. For advanced buying, management or selling services, we use a transparent fee model that we explain with no commitment.

faqItems.q: Which areas do you operate in?
faqItems.a: We operate across Spain. Financial and model advisory is 100% digital.

faqItems.q: How long does a response take?
faqItems.a: We reply within a maximum of 24 hours on business days. Messages received Friday afternoon are handled on Monday.

contact.botReply_compra: To find the most suitable car I analyse your budget, real usage and whether a financed purchase or leasing suits you better. Tell me a bit more about your situation.
contact.botReply_venta: To help you sell your car well I can help you set the right price with market data and prepare the listing or certification. Do you have a vehicle in mind?
contact.botReply_gestion: I can guide you on maintenance, insurance or any admin related to your car. What do you need to manage?
contact.botReply_default: Got it. To give you a useful answer I need a bit more context. Can you tell me more about your situation with the car?

autogestor.subtitle: All your car information in a single panel: documentation, insurance policy, maintenance invoices and warranties. Never lose a document again.
